name: Market Crossroads Culture in Practice
greeting_norms: People begin by locating status, purpose, or sequence before they begin by expressing warmth.
Locals reward concise clarity more than theatrical familiarity.
dress_signals: Workwear, ritual markers, or authority badges matter more than ornament alone.
Outsiders are read by whether their clothing matches their claimed business.
transaction_norms: Promises are treated as lighter than witnessed process.
People expect you to know when a request becomes a burden on sequence.
shrine_or_ritual_behavior: Those who pause at sacred or civic thresholds without understanding them are noticed.
suspicion_triggers: asking for restricted access too quickly
outsider_treatment: Outsiders are tolerated fastest when they accept correction without turning it into a performance.
